specs.title: cp-000: Clicking a project row closes the dropdown and calls selectProjectid
cp-001: Left-rail navigation includes a static Current Draft item that is not a link
cp-002: Left-rail navigation includes a link to library labeled My Library
cp-003: Left-rail navigation includes a link to research labeled Literature Search
cp-004: Left-rail reference section heading shows References N using the live reference
cp-005: Left-rail reference Plus button opens the citation dialog while preserving the c
cp-006: When there are no cited sources yet the left rail shows the helper text Use CmdS
cp-007: Left rail shows at most five cited sources before collapsing the rest behind a s
cp-008: View all N references button appears only when referencessize 5
cp-009: AI Credits progress bar falls back to 0 50000 when usage stats are unavailable
cp-010: In Write mode an AI Intensity strip appears above the saveexport toolbar
cp-011: Write-mode intensity buttons are Focus Collaborate and Accelerate
cp-012: Write-mode default intensity is Collaborate
cp-013: Each intensity button exposes the matching description string in its title attri
cp-014: Active Focus uses sky styling active Collaborate uses brand styling and active A
cp-015: Changing draft intensity updates local mode state immediately without waiting fo
cp-016: Write-mode helper line under the buttons updates to the description for the curr
cp-017: In Learn mode the top banner text is Guide Mode I wont write for you Ill teach y
cp-018: Learn-mode document-type picker button defaults to Select document type
cp-019: Learn-mode document-type picker closes immediately after selecting a type
cp-020: Learn-mode stage tracker is hidden until a guide document type has been chosen
cp-021: Once a guide document type is selected stage buttons render in the order defined
cp-022: Active guide stage uses solid emerald styling
cp-023: Completed guide stages use lighter emerald styling
cp-024: Future guide stages use muted styling until selected
cp-025: Studio save indicator renders in the center toolbar even before the first save c
cp-026: Studio saving state shows a spinning CircleNotch and Saving
cp-027: Studio saved state shows a CloudCheck icon and Saved HHMM
cp-028: Studio unsaved state shows Unsaved changes
cp-029: Studio error state shows Save failed
cp-030: Studio idle state with a prior timestamp still renders Saved HHMM
cp-031: onDirty writes a fallback JSON draft to localStoragescholarsync_studio_draft
cp-032: Local studio draft payload includes content plainText wordCount timestamp and ti
cp-033: Studio local-draft save failures are swallowed silently when localStorage is ful
cp-034: Studio export trigger opens a small dropdown menu instead of a modal dialog
